citation: Hanson, Jonathan K. and Rachel Sigman. 2021. 'Leviathan's Latent Dimensions: Measuring State Capacity for Comparative Political Research.' Journal of Politics 83(4): 1495–1510.

index.label: State capacity
index.description: Bayesian latent index of state capacity combining extractive (taxation), coercive (military / police), and administrative (bureaucratic quality) dimensions. Unitless; higher = more capable. Typical range ≈ [-2.5, 3.0]. The shaded band shows ±1 posterior standard deviation.
